name: Oh Curio App
description: A frontend-based library shop application. Features a unique mobile UI design where an embedded website runs inside the homepage hero section, along with a custom SMTP setup for email communication.
features: Innovative mobile UI with an embedded website in the hero section
SMTP integration for sending and receiving emails
challenges: Designing an embedded, interactive website experience specifically optimized for the mobile hero section.
improvements: Expand backend functionalities and enhance e-commerce features.

name: Learning Management System (LMS)
description: A modern Learning Management System designed for online education with role-based dashboards, course management, and digital learning resources. Supports course publishing, assignments, quizzes, and file-based learning materials.
features: SCORM package upload and course content management
Student enrollment, progress tracking, and REST API integration
challenges: Managing SCORM package uploads and complex role-based routing.
improvements: Implement interactive live classes and advanced analytics.

name: MyLocalPro
description: A full-stack service marketplace platform connecting customers with trusted local professionals across Australia. Includes three core roles: Admin, Service Providers, and Users.
features: Fully Responsive Design for all devices
challenges: Managing three distinct user roles with varying permissions and ensuring a seamless experience across all device types.
improvements: Implement real-time notifications for inquiries and integrated payment processing.

name: AcctEmpire
description: A complete multi-vendor marketplace platform focused on buying and selling digital assets and social media accounts. Features a professional admin dashboard, dedicated seller/buyer dashboards, and a secure transaction system with Naira to USD conversion.
features: Professional admin dashboard with full system control
Dedicated dashboards for sellers, buyers, and referral users
Naira to USD conversion with manual rate control
Custom authentication system with secure password reset
Deployed on VPS infrastructure for performance and reliability
challenges: Implementing a secure multi-vendor architecture and a flexible currency conversion system.
improvements: Integrate automated payment verification and mobile application.

name: Real Ested
description: A full-stack web application built as part of Programming Hero Assignment 12, featuring client-server integration and user authentication.
challenges: Managing client-server communication and implementing secure Firebase authentication.
improvements: Add advanced features and improve UI responsiveness.

name: Event Booking Web App
description: A user-friendly event booking app with authentication, event search, and user dashboard functionalities.
challenges: Implementing secure authentication and managing user-specific event bookings.
improvements: Integrate payment gateways and add event reminders.

name: Plant Care Tracker
description: A full-stack responsive web app to track and manage your plants with personalized dashboards and reminders.
challenges: Managing real-time updates and building an intuitive UI for plant tracking.
improvements: Adding mobile apps and AI-powered care suggestions.

name: Marathon Management System
description: A system for managing marathon registrations, countdown timers, and admin CRUD operations.
challenges: Handling JWT securely and creating dynamic countdown timers.
improvements: Add payment integration and real-time registration analytics.
